name: post-compact
doc: PostCompact (core scope) re-injects the reconciliation snapshot plus the one-line 'context was compacted' reminder as additionalContext (dispatch.ts → postCompactContext → renderSnapshot). $TMP is not a git repo but the Version collector always renders the running harness version, so the block is present and the reminder rides in front. Unit parity: test/post-compact.test.ts.

steps.doc: PostCompact → stdout additionalContext leads with the compaction reminder.
